title: Neutron Highway Boosts
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM JetConeBoost WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} neutron star jet cone boost(s) taken during the report period — each one supercharging the frame shift drive by skimming through the jet emission cone of a neutron star, multiplying jump range at the cost of increased FSD wear.
details.help: JetConeBoost fires each time a jet cone boost is applied from a neutron star or white dwarf. Each boost multiplies the next FSD jump range. summaryOnly: trivially 0 or 1 per system.

tagLines: Neutron jet cone utilisation logged. Pilots Federation recommends appropriate frame shift drive maintenance.
You flew through a neutron star. On purpose. For the range boost. Respect.
The neutron highway: where the fuel stations are dying stars and the signs point toward the void.
